goal: Define plan-artifact/v1 and require it for high-risk PR pre-review.
scope: Add schema, generator, validator, policy-gate enforcement, PR summary integration, and operator documentation.

assumptions.text: High-risk PRs can commit plan artifacts under artifacts/plan before review.
policy-gate checkout contains committed plan artifacts from the PR branch.

verificationPlan.name: Contract and unit tests
verificationPlan.command: pnpm exec vitest run tests/contracts/plan-artifact-contract.test.ts tests/unit/ci/plan-artifact-generate.test.ts tests/unit/ci/plan-artifact-validate.test.ts tests/unit/ci/risk-policy.test.ts tests/unit/ci/policy-gate.test.ts

verificationPlan.name: Schema and docs validation
verificationPlan.command: node scripts/ci/validate-json.mjs && pnpm -s run check:doc-consistency && pnpm -s run check:ci-doc-index-consistency

rollbackPlan: Revert the plan-artifact schema, scripts, policy-gate integration, and PR summary wiring.
requiredHumanInput: Confirm the high-risk review scope before implementation proceeds.
Approve the required verification and rollback plan for the PR.
notes: Change Package remains the after-change evidence artifact; this contract only covers before-change review.
